message:
test(fcp-core): pin BackpressureLevel + BackpressureSignal serde shape (flywheel_connectors-yaan6)

Bead asks for BackpressureSignal Display formatting. Neither
BackpressureSignal (ratelimit.rs:280) nor BackpressureLevel
(ratelimit.rs:37) implements Display, so the bead's "Display
formatting" ask has no direct analogue. Pinning targets the serde
wire form (audit logs / dashboards filter on it) plus the struct
shape with skip_serializing_if semantics on retry_after_ms.

Coverage:
- BackpressureLevel per-variant JSON tag pinned (snake_case:
  normal/warning/soft_limit/hard_limit) — rate-limiter dashboards
  filter on these tokens
- JSON + CBOR round-trip per variant
- CBOR encodes as Text (not integer) for cross-language consumers
- PascalCase + kebab-case + unknown tokens rejected
- Multi-word variants use underscore not hyphen or smush
  (soft_limit/hard_limit, NOT soft-limit/softlimit)
- 4-variant count + pairwise distinctness sentinel
- BackpressureSignal 3-field JSON shape pinned with nested
  BackpressureLevel
- retry_after_ms omitted from wire when None via
  skip_serializing_if; present (even as 0) when Some — distinguishable
- BackpressureSignal JSON + CBOR round-trip preserves all 3 fields
  including None retry_after_ms
- utilization_bps boundary values (0, 10_000 documented max,
  u16::MAX) round-trip — last case pins that serde does NOT
  enforce the 0..=10_000 cap so any future tightening surfaces
- retry_after_ms boundary values (0, u64::MAX) round-trip through
  both JSON and CBOR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
